data.body: MAJOR DISCOVERY: txn.py (transition_core/claim_core) writes UNSIGNED STATUS/EDIT events — the transactional path bypasses _apply_authorship (the signing seam + write-gate). Confirmed by direct test: a STATUS event written now (signing live, author_id 594c present) has author_sig=False, while CREATE/COMMENT sign. The CI verify-identity gate flags these unsigned in-scope events, so require_authenticated=true would FAIL on every new transition/claim/close, blocking all landing. This is a foundational signing gap NOT in the epic's 5 stories -> blocks the 8d39 flip. Created bug 0ba4-6a28-7a88-47b2 (discovered_from dc09). Surfacing to user for direction (fix txn.py signing then flip, vs hold the flip).
